resources.title: MIT OCW 18.06 — Lecture Notes
resources.notes: Companion notes to Strang's legendary lectures

resources.title: Introduction to Linear Algebra (Strang, 6th ed.) — Textbook Site
resources.notes: Classic textbook; clear intuition for core concepts

resources.title: The Matrix Cookbook (PDF)
resources.notes: Handy reference of identities, derivatives, and decompositions

resources.title: Immersive Linear Algebra (Online Book)
resources.notes: Fully interactive textbook with embedded visualizations

resources.title: 3Blue1Brown — Essence of Linear Algebra
resources.notes: Best-in-class animated intuition for vectors, spans, and transformations

resources.title: MIT 18.06 — Linear Algebra (Gilbert Strang)
resources.notes: Gold-standard full lecture series — 34 lectures

resources.title: StatQuest: Linear Algebra Fundamentals
resources.notes: Bite-sized, intuition-first explanations

resources.title: Khan Academy — Linear Algebra
resources.notes: Free, self-paced with exercises

resources.title: Mathematics for Machine Learning: Linear Algebra (Coursera / Imperial College)
resources.notes: Short, practical course focused on ML applications

resources.title: fast.ai — Computational Linear Algebra
resources.notes: Top-down, code-first approach to numerical methods

resources.title: Interactive Linear Algebra (Georgia Tech)
resources.notes: Interactive textbook — visualize vectors, spans, and transformations

resources.title: Eigenvectors and Eigenvalues Explained Visually
resources.notes: Drag-to-explore eigenvalue visualization

resources.title: Matrix Multiplication Visualizer
resources.notes: Step-through matmul animation

resources.title: Finding Structure with Randomness: Probabilistic Algorithms for Constructing Approximate Matrix Decompositions (Halko, Martinsson, Tropp)
resources.notes: Foundational paper for scalable randomized SVD

resources.title: Attention Is All You Need (Vaswani et al.)
resources.notes: See how linear algebra (matrix multiply, softmax) powers modern Transformers

resources.title: NumPy — Linear Algebra Routines
resources.notes: Official NumPy reference for linalg operations

resources.title: Scikit-learn — Decomposition
resources.notes: PCA, SVD, NMF and more — practical decompositions

resources.title: A Visual Intro to NumPy and Data Representation (Jay Alammar)
resources.notes: Rich visual walkthrough of NumPy arrays and operations

resources.title: The SVD — A Geometric Interpretation (Gregory Gundersen)
resources.notes: One of the clearest geometric explanations of SVD

resources.title: 2 | [Prompt Engineering](prompt-engineering.md) | Prompting techniques, chain-of-thought, few-shot, system prompts
resources.notes: Fine-tuning, LoRA, QLoRA, adapters, instruction tuning

resources.title: 4 | [RAG Systems](rag-systems.md) | Retrieval-Augmented Generation, vector databases, chunking, hybrid search
resources.notes: Stable Diffusion, text-to-image, video generation

resources.title: 📄 Paper | [Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models (Ho et al., 2020)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2006.11239) | Foundational DDPM paper establishing the Gaussian diffusion + UNet framework | Advanced | 2026-06
resources.notes: Introduces Stable Diffusion — diffusion in latent space with cross-attention conditioning | Intermediate | 2026-06

resources.title: 🎥 Video | [Diffusion Models Explained (YouTube)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fbLgFrlTnGU) | Visual walkthrough of DDPM training, sampling, and the reverse diffusion process | Beginner | 2026-06
resources.notes: Minimal PyTorch implementation of DDPM on MNIST / CIFAR-10 | Advanced | 2026-06

resources.title: 🕹️ Visualizer/Playground | [Stable Diffusion Web UI (AUTOMATIC1111)](https://github.com/AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui) | Popular browser interface for SD with prompt editing, inpainting, ControlNet, and extensions | Intermediate | 2026-06
resources.notes: Comprehensive blog post covering DDPM, score matching, SDEs, and classifier-free guidance | Intermediate | 2026-06

resources.title: 📄 Paper | [LoRA: Low-Rank Adaptation (Hu et al., 2021)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2106.09685) | Introduces low-rank weight updates that can be merged at inference time with zero added latency | Intermediate | 2026-06
resources.notes: Combines 4-bit NormalFloat quantization with LoRA to fine-tune 65B models on a single 48GB GPU | Advanced | 2026-06

resources.title: 💻 Code/Notebook | [QLoRA fine-tuning tutorial (Colab)](https://github.com/example/qlora-finetune) | End-to-end notebook for fine-tuning Llama 2 / Mistral with QLoRA on custom datasets | Intermediate | 2026-06
resources.notes: Course module covering tokenizer training, dataset preparation, and trainer API for SFT | Intermediate | 2026-06

resources.title: 📰 Blog | [LoRA explained (Sebastian Raschka)](https://magazine.sebastianraschka.com/p/practical-tips-for-finetuning-llms) | Practical deep-dive on LoRA rank selection, where to apply adapters, and merging strategies | Intermediate | 2026-06
resources.notes: Open-source library for simplified fine-tuning with support for multiple PEFT methods and distributed training | Advanced | 2026-06

resources.title: 📄 Paper | [Scaling Laws for Neural Language Models (Kaplan et al., 2020)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2001.08361) | Foundational paper establishing power-law scaling relationships between model size, data, and compute | Intermediate | 2026-06
resources.notes: Connects modern Hopfield networks to transformer attention, providing a theoretical lens | Advanced | 2026-06

resources.title: 🎓 Course | [Stanford CS224N — Transformers & Pretraining](https://web.stanford.edu/class/cs224n/) | Lecture series covering the evolution from RNNs to GPT-family architectures | Intermediate | 2026-06
resources.notes: Minimal CPU-based inference engine demonstrating tokenization, KV-cache, and sampling | Advanced | 2026-06

resources.title: 📰 Blog | [Illustrated Transformer (Jay Alammar)](https://jalammar.github.io/illustrated-transformer/) | Visual deep-dive into attention, multi-head attention, and positional encodings | Beginner | 2026-06
resources.notes: Intuitive animated explanation of attention mechanisms and transformer blocks | Beginner | 2026-06

resources.title: 📄 Paper | [LLaVA: Large Language and Vision Assistant (Liu et al., 2023)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2304.08485) | Connects a CLIP vision encoder to a Vicuna LLM via a simple projection layer; strong instruction following | Intermediate | 2026-06
resources.notes: Pioneers interleaved text-image few-shot learning with gated cross-attention | Advanced | 2026-06

resources.title: 💻 Code/Notebook | [HuggingFace — Multimodal Transformers](https://huggingface.co/docs/transformers/en/multimodal) | Official notebooks for CLIP, BLIP2, Llava, and ImageBind inference and fine-tuning | Intermediate | 2026-06
resources.notes: Given an image, generates the text prompt that best describes it using CLIP embeddings | Beginner | 2026-06

resources.title: 🎥 Video | [Vision-Language Models explained (Stanford MLSys)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=example) | Seminar covering contrastive learning, visual grounding, and recent VLM architectures | Advanced | 2026-06
resources.notes: Analysis of GPT-4V's visual capabilities: OCR, chart reading, spatial reasoning, and safety | Intermediate | 2026-06

resources.title: 🕹️ Visualizer/Playground | [Anthropic Console — Claude](https://console.anthropic.com/) | Prompt development environment for Claude with message history, system prompt editor, and output comparison | Beginner | 2026-06
resources.notes: Free browser IDE for Gemini with multimodal prompting (image, audio, video), safety tuning, and model comparison | Beginner | 2026-06

resources.title: 🕹️ Visualizer/Playground | [HuggingFace Spaces](https://huggingface.co/spaces) | Community-hosted Gradio/Streamlit demos for thousands of models: text, image, audio, video, 3D | Intermediate | 2026-06
resources.notes: Cloud API with a web UI to run open-source models: Stable Diffusion, Flux, Whisper, LLaMA, and more | Beginner | 2026-06

resources.title: 🕹️ Visualizer/Playground | [Stable Diffusion Web UI (AUTOMATIC1111)](https://github.com/AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui) | Self-hosted Gradio interface for image generation, inpainting, ControlNet, and LoRA switching | Intermediate | 2026-06
resources.notes: Free chat interface for experimenting with open-source LLMs (Llama, Mistral, Mixtral, Sonar) | Beginner | 2026-06

resources.title: 📘 Docs | [Anthropic Prompt Engineering Guide](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/build-with-claude/prompt-engineering) | Comprehensive guide with techniques specific to Claude, including XML tags and chain-of-thought | Beginner | 2026-06
resources.notes: Demonstrates that step-by-step reasoning prompts drastically improve multi-step arithmetic and logic | Intermediate | 2026-06

resources.title: 📄 Paper | [Tree of Thoughts (Yao et al., 2023)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2305.10601) | Extends CoT with tree search over reasoning paths, enabling deliberate planning | Advanced | 2026-06
resources.notes: Framework for evaluating prompt robustness across adversarial, OOD, and style perturbations | Advanced | 2026-06

resources.title: 🕹️ Visualizer/Playground | [OpenAI Playground](https://platform.openai.com/playground) | Interactive chat and completion sandbox with adjustable system prompt, temperature, and top-p | Beginner | 2026-06
resources.notes: Short hands-on course by Isa Fulford & Andrew Ng covering iterative prompt development | Beginner | 2026-06

resources.title: 📄 Paper | [Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Knowledge-Intensive NLP Tasks (Lewis et al., 2020)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2005.11401) | Original RAG paper proposing DPR + BART fusion-in-decoder for open-domain QA | Intermediate | 2026-06
resources.notes: Introduces masked language modeling with a learned retriever during pretraining | Advanced | 2026-06

resources.title: 💻 Code/Notebook | [LlamaIndex — RAG Starter Notebook](https://docs.llamaindex.ai/en/stable/examples/) | Practical notebooks covering basic RAG, advanced retrieval, and agentic RAG patterns | Intermediate | 2026-06
resources.notes: Step-by-step video series building a RAG pipeline: chunking, embeddings, vector search, generation | Intermediate | 2026-06

resources.title: 🕹️ Visualizer/Playground | [ChromaDB interactive demo](https://example.com/chromadb-demo) | Browser-based playground to experiment with collections, embedding functions, and query filters | Beginner | 2026-06
resources.notes: Production considerations for RAG: data ingestion pipelines, chunking strategies, and latency optimization | Advanced | 2026-06
